how to install rust

prerequisites
- a 64-bit operating system (linux, macos, or windows)
- internet connection

installation steps
go to rustup.rs in your browser
run the installer command shown on the page
follow the on-screen prompts
restart your terminal

verify the installation
run rustc --version to check the compiler
run cargo --version to check the build tool
both should print a version number

next steps
read the rust book at doc.rust-lang.org
try the rustlings exercises
join the rust community forum
